ai.zhDef: 让机器表现出类似人类智能行为的技术总称。注意 AI 不等于 LLM——LLM 只是其中一种。
ai.enDef: Umbrella term for techniques that make machines behave intelligently. AI ≠ LLM — LLMs are just one branch.

llm.zhDef: 大语言模型。通过预测下一个 token 来生成文本的神经网络。ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 背后都是 LLM。
llm.enDef: Large Language Model. A neural network that generates text by predicting the next token. ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini are all LLMs.

token.zhDef: 模型读写文本的最小单位。1 个中文字 ≈ 1-2 个 token，1 个英文单词 ≈ 1-2 个 token。Token 数量直接决定花多少钱、占多少上下文。
token.enDef: The smallest unit a model reads/writes. One Chinese character ≈ 1-2 tokens, one English word ≈ 1-2 tokens. Token count drives both cost and context usage.

context.zhDef: AI 一次对话能看到的总 token 数量。Claude 4.7 大约 200K，GPT-5 约 400K。超出窗口的内容会被截断。
context.enDef: The total tokens a model can see in one conversation. Claude 4.7 ≈ 200K, GPT-5 ≈ 400K. Content beyond this gets truncated.

prompt.zhDef: 你发给 AI 的输入文本。Prompt 写得好不好，直接决定输出质量。
prompt.enDef: The input text you send to an AI. Prompt quality directly drives output quality.

system-prompt.zhDef: 对话开始前设定 AI 角色、规则、风格的特殊 prompt。整个对话过程都生效。
system-prompt.enDef: A special prompt that sets the AI's role, rules, and style before the conversation starts. Persists across all turns.

hallucination.zhDef: AI 生成看似可信但实际错误或虚构的内容。LLM 本质是预测下一个 token，不是查事实，所以会幻觉。
hallucination.enDef: When AI generates plausible-sounding but false or fabricated content. LLMs predict the next token, they don't look up facts.

agent.zhDef: Anthropic 的定义：系统让 LLM 自己决定下一步用什么工具、做什么动作。和 workflow 的区别在于：workflow 的步骤是写死的，agent 是 LLM 临场决定的。
agent.enDef: Per Anthropic: a system where the LLM dynamically directs its own tool use. Differs from workflow, where steps are hard-coded by code.

workflow.zhDef: LLM 和工具按照预先写好的代码路径协调工作。相比 agent，可预测、可调试、可控。大部分实际应用其实是 workflow，不是 agent。
workflow.enDef: LLMs and tools orchestrated through predefined code paths. More predictable, debuggable, controllable than agents. Most real apps are workflows, not agents.

tool-use.zhDef: 让 LLM 不仅能说话，还能调用外部函数（搜索、查天气、执行代码等）。模型返回一个结构化的调用请求，你的代码去执行，再把结果喂回去。
tool-use.enDef: Letting an LLM call external functions (search, weather, code execution, etc.). The model returns a structured tool_use request; your code executes it and feeds the result back.

rag.zhDef: 检索增强生成。先从你自己的资料库里检索相关片段，再喂给 LLM 回答问题。让 AI 能答它原本不知道的内容。
rag.enDef: Retrieval-Augmented Generation. Search your own knowledge base first, then feed the retrieved chunks to the LLM. Lets AI answer about content it wasn't trained on.

embedding.zhDef: 把一段文字变成一串数字（向量），语义相近的文字向量也相近。是 RAG 搜索和语义匹配的基础。
embedding.enDef: Turning text into a vector of numbers where semantically similar text has similar vectors. The foundation of RAG and semantic search.

cot.zhDef: 让 AI '一步一步想'再回答的 prompt 技巧。对数学、逻辑、推理类问题特别有效。
cot.enDef: A prompting technique that asks the AI to 'think step by step' before answering. Especially effective for math, logic, and reasoning problems.

few-shot.zhDef: 在 prompt 里给 AI 看几个示例（通常 3-5 个），告诉它'要这样回答'。Anthropic 称之为'最可靠的引导方法之一'。
few-shot.enDef: Showing the AI a few examples (usually 3-5) in the prompt to demonstrate the target output. Anthropic calls this 'one of the most reliable techniques'.

zero-shot.zhDef: 不给任何示例，直接让 AI 完成任务。现代 LLM 大部分简单任务都能 zero-shot 做好。
zero-shot.enDef: Asking the AI to do something with no examples. Modern LLMs handle most simple tasks zero-shot.

transformer.zhDef: 2017 年 Google 论文 Attention is All You Need 提出的神经网络结构，今天所有主流 LLM 的底层架构。
transformer.enDef: Neural network architecture from Google's 2017 paper 'Attention is All You Need'. The foundation of every modern LLM.

attention.zhDef: Transformer 的核心机制：模型在生成每个 token 时，会回头看前面所有 token 并决定哪些更重要。类比：读小说时会回头翻前文。
attention.enDef: Core mechanism of the Transformer: when generating each token, the model looks back at all previous tokens and decides which matter most.

fine-tuning.zhDef: 在已有的预训练模型基础上，用更小的、专门的数据集再训练一遍，让它在特定任务上更强。
fine-tuning.enDef: Taking a pre-trained model and training it further on a smaller, specialized dataset to make it better at a specific task.

inference.zhDef: 你每次跟 AI 对话，它都在做 inference——用训练好的参数生成回答。区别于 training（训练）。
inference.enDef: Each time you chat with AI, it runs inference — using trained parameters to generate a response. Different from training.

mcp.zhDef: Anthropic 2024 年推出的开放协议，让 AI 工具能用统一的方式连接到外部数据源和工具。像 USB-C 接口之于设备。
mcp.enDef: Anthropic's 2024 open protocol that lets AI tools connect to external data sources and tools in a standard way. Like USB-C for AI.

claude-md.zhDef: Claude Code 的项目配置文件，每次启动自动加载。相当于给 Claude 写的'团队约定'。最佳实践：控制在 200 行以内。
claude-md.enDef: Claude Code's per-project config file, auto-loaded on each session. Like a 'team handbook' for Claude. Best practice: keep under 200 lines.

multimodal.zhDef: 多模态。能同时处理文本、图像、音频、视频等多种输入输出。现代旗舰模型几乎全是多模态的。
multimodal.enDef: Multimodal. Able to process text, images, audio, video, etc. together. Most flagship models today are multimodal.

human-in-the-loop.zhDef: 在 AI 流程中保留关键人工审批点。例如发邮件、转账、删数据这类高风险动作必须人工确认。
human-in-the-loop.enDef: Keeping critical human approval points in an AI pipeline. High-risk actions like sending emails, transferring money, or deleting data require human confirmation.

structured-output.zhDef: 让 AI 输出严格符合某个格式（JSON、XML、表格）的结果，方便程序解析。
structured-output.enDef: Forcing the AI to output in a strict format (JSON, XML, table) so downstream code can parse it.

api-key.zhDef: 调用 AI 服务的身份凭证，相当于密码。绝对不要上传到 GitHub 或贴到公开聊天里。
api-key.enDef: Your credential for calling an AI service — like a password. Never commit it to GitHub or paste it in public chats.

api.zhDef: 应用程序接口。程序之间互相通信的「插头」——你的代码通过 API 调用 AI 服务，就像用遥控器控制电视，不需要知道内部怎么工作。
api.enDef: Application Programming Interface. A defined way for programs to talk to each other — like a socket that lets your code plug into AI services without knowing what's inside.

github.zhDef: 全球最大的代码托管平台。可以把它理解为代码的「云盘 + 版本历史」，开发者在这里存储、分享和协作开发代码。
github.enDef: The world's largest code hosting platform — think Google Drive + version history for code. Developers store, share, and collaborate on code here.

environment-variable.zhDef: 环境变量。储存在操作系统里的配置值（比如密码、API Key），程序运行时自动读取，不需要写死在代码里，更安全。
environment-variable.enDef: A configuration value stored in the operating system (like passwords or API keys). Programs read them at runtime instead of hardcoding sensitive values into source code.

open-source.zhDef: 开源。代码完全公开，任何人都可以查看、使用和改进。例如 Linux、Python 都是开源项目。
open-source.enDef: Software whose source code is publicly available for anyone to view, use, and modify. Examples: Linux, Python.

terminal.zhDef: 终端/命令行。用文字命令操控电脑的窗口，不需要图形界面。很多 AI 工具需要在这里运行。
terminal.enDef: A text-based interface for controlling your computer with typed commands. Many AI tools are run from here instead of a graphical app.
